caption: VPC
description: The VPC (Virtual Private Cloud) object describes an isolated virtual network in a cloud environment.
name: vpc

cidr.description: The primary CIDR block of the VPC. For example: 10.0.0.0/16.

region.description: The cloud region in which the VPC resides.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the VPC. For example, an AWS VPC ID.
